Box #10—Revise the Rhythm
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #5—Box #10 Revise the Rhythm
*What might you do intermittently that you’re now doing continuously?
What could you do continuously that you’re now doing intermittently?
You may not realize how draining it is to you, your company or a situation when you are
doing something continuously. You may not even realize you’re doing it. Conversely, for
some things in some situations, it’s better to do things continuously than every once in a while.
How else might you revise the rhythm of your problem? For example, a friend of mine transformed
his company simply by changing the rhythm of team meetings ––adding in weekly status meetings,
monthly planning meetings, quarterly big-picture planning, and annual retreats. Experiment!
*How might you revise the rhythm in some other way?
Look closely enough and every aspect of life and business, every undertaking, every project,
has its own rhythm. Find them. Look at when things are done, when things happen, when
this or that occurs. What might happen when you change the rhythm. Make sure the rhythm
is to your advantage.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
